reviews.review_description: please fix paid 10 dollars and it doesn't work disappointed
Please send a fix or give money back. 10€ and no application working on s7 effet. 0% download on each videos.

developer_response.body: Hello! Sorry for this inconvenience, we experience a complex problem and working hard fixing it. The refund policy is not on the developer's side, but it is described here by Oculus: https://www.oculus.com/legal/mobile-content-refund-policy/. But as developers we ​would like to reward you for choosing Virry and for staying with us for a while! Can you please share your e-mail so we could connect with you when the app will be fixed and present a reward?

Hello! We are terribly sorry for such inconvenience. We found out a complex problem and still fixing it. Can you please share your e-mail with us so we would be able to notify you as soon as the update will be released?

reviews.review_description:
I first installed it and was able to download the lion "experience", but when I ran it, like some of the other reviews, got only a black screen and the sound.  None of the other animals downloaded, they stayed at 0%.

I uninstalled and reinstalled and now none of the animals download, all at 0%, despite having a good wifi connection.

I have a galaxy s7.

Very disappointing, since the first safari worked well.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for letting us know about these issues. We are terribly sorry for such inconvenience. We found out a complex problem and still fixing it. We will notify you as soon as the update will be released.

reviews.review_description:
Would love to see this but l can not get it to work, so l got a refund and after learning it might work l decided to buy it again to see but nothing. I don't know yet if l was charged again but it is very disappointing  because l love the previous one.


Yes l have the Samsung 8+. Is there anything l can do to make it work please.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you for letting us know about these issues. We are terribly sorry for such inconvenience. These issues might appear with S8, S9 & Note8 running on Android 8 (Oreo). Can you please specify which Samsung model do you have?

reviews.review_description: Got All 3 Live Cameras Which Was Amazing Free For 15 Mins but now ive subscribed and paid none of the cameras are working

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your feedback. Do have this problem now? Live cameras only work when your internet connection is good.

reviews.review_description:
I can see only the black screen and application doesn't respond to any actions. I'm not able to switch back to the Oculus Home, helps just restarting VR
Samsung note 8 with Oreo
Please fix

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your report — we appreciate this a lot! We are working on this issue and will keep you updated on the status soon!

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed it. But please fix the lion and cheetah option as there is nothing but a black background when i click into it.

developer_response.body: Hi Kevin! Thank you for your feedback and our apologies you faced difficulities using Virry. The lion and leopard (cheetah experience is in our first release called 'Virry Safari: Wild Encounters') work well on our side. Could you please check if they work smoothly for you now?

reviews.review_description: I sent USD 9.9 , but can't play any download , why???

developer_response.body: Hello! Sorry to hear you are experiencing issues with Virry. You should not be able to download any of the experiences if there isn't enough space on your device - however, to be sure, please verify you have enough space left. The experiences contain 360 videos in 4K so each download is 300-500MB in size. You can try clearing the app data ( https://www.androidcentral.com/how-and-when-clear-app-cache-or-data-android ) and re-downloading the content and/or deleti​n​g the whole app and re-installing via Oculus Home. If nothing helps, could you please tell us which version of Android you are running on your device? Is the Oculus app up to date?

reviews.review_title: Doesn't work. Don't waste your money.
reviews.review_description: Can't download any content. It just stays at 0%. Tried reinstalling, didn't help. My internet connection is fast enough. Note 4.

developer_response.body: Hello! Sorry for such inconvenience. We are preparing an update this week, so problems soon will be fixed.

reviews.review_description:
I am unable to open / download any of the animals they stay at 0%
 I have taken screenshots if they will be of some help
I don't understand how this app is award-winning if it doesn't work 
when I try to connect to the live videos it says " a network error occurred please try again."
Please inform me when this will be fixed I will be happy to leave my email and stay with the app for a little while longer if you are certain to get it working soon
jamesjeannetti@gmail.com

developer_response.body: Hello! We are terribly sorry for such inconvenience. Thank you for sharing your e-mail with us — we'll notify you when the app will be updated and reward you for staying with us. We appreciate this a lot!
